findings.detail: DM contains 306 subjects matching expected screened population
ADSL contains 254 subjects matching ITT population (52 screen failures excluded)
USUBJID follows XX-XXX-XXXX format across all SDTM domains
All 254 ADSL USUBJIDs exist in DM; 52 DM subjects (ARMCD=Scrnfail) excluded from ADSL per study design
